phases.name: Create Dashboard App Shell & Layout
phases.description: Create the React dashboard app shell in web/dashboard/src/. Create: App.tsx as root component with React Router setup, main.tsx entry point, index.css for global styles, layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx with sidebar navigation and header, layouts/PublicLayout.tsx for unauthenticated pages, router/index.tsx defining all route configurations. Implement proper TypeScript types and use React Router v6. Include navigation items for Dashboard, Jobs, Devices, Documents, Settings. Run npm run type-check to verify.

phases.name: Create Device Management UI Components
phases.description: Create React components for device/printer management in web/dashboard/src/features/devices/. Create: Devices.tsx main listing page with table view, DeviceCard.tsx for individual device display, DeviceRegister.tsx form for adding new printers, DeviceDetail.tsx for printer details and status. Add TypeScript interfaces for Device, Printer, Agent types in types.ts. Implement API calls using fetch to registry-service endpoints (GET /api/agents, POST /api/agents). Include status indicators (online/offline) and last heartbeat display. Run npm run type-check to verify.

phases.name: Create Document Management UI Components
phases.description: Create React components for document storage in web/dashboard/src/features/documents/. Create: Documents.tsx main listing page, DocumentCard.tsx for document preview cards, DocumentUpload.tsx with drag-drop file upload, DocumentViewer.tsx for viewing document details. Add types.ts with Document, UploadMetadata interfaces. Implement API calls to storage-service (GET /api/documents, POST /api/documents, GET /api/documents/{id}). Display file name, size, upload date, encryption status. Add download button functionality. Run npm run type-check to verify.

phases.name: Create Dashboard UI & Analytics Components
phases.description: Create React components for dashboard home and analytics in web/dashboard/src/features/dashboard/. Create: DashboardHome.tsx with stats cards (total jobs, active devices, storage used), StatCard.tsx reusable metric display component, RecentActivity.tsx showing recent job events, JobChart.tsx using a simple chart library or CSS for job statistics visualization. Add types.ts with DashboardStats, Activity types. Fetch data from analytics-service and job-service APIs. Implement responsive grid layout for stat cards. Run npm run type-check to verify.

phases.name: Create Settings & User Profile Components
phases.description: Create React components for settings and user management in web/dashboard/src/features/settings/. Create: Settings.tsx main settings page with tabs, ProfileSettings.tsx for user profile editing form, SecuritySettings.tsx for password change and 2FA toggle, OrganizationSettings.tsx for org info and member management. Add types.ts with User, Organization, Settings types. Implement API calls to auth-service (PUT /api/user/profile, PUT /api/user/password). Form validation with proper error handling. Save functionality with toast notifications. Run npm run type-check to verify.

critical_issues: Frontend completely missing (0/28 files) - 15% weight lost
Multiple backend services incomplete (gateway, analytics, notification, organization) - 15% endpoint weight lost
strengths: Core services (auth, registry, job, storage) have working endpoints

rationale: These 5 tasks focus on frontend_files dimension (15% weight) which is at 0%. Creating ~15-20 React/TypeScript files will significantly boost completion score. All tasks are completable in single Claude Code sessions and directly address the highest-impact gap. Backend endpoint gaps will be addressed after frontend foundation is established.
